title: DiosesMC - Modpack vegetil
description: A modpack so pretty and comfortable that Vegetta himself would use it
body:
**A Modpack that aims to replicate the very same modpack used by Vegetta777**

This modpack tries to recreate the experience Vegetta has while playing on his server DiosesMC, while also improving some optimization aspects that aren’t fully polished in the game. This is not an official modpack; it’s a fan-made project.

I hope you like it and enjoy this project!

What if I find a problem with the modpack?
If you happen to find any issue with the modpack, please report it **[[here] ](https://discord.gg/3XPQVet6CR)**
